'''Doornik-628''' was the yellow primary of the [[Doornik-628 system]] in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]]. It was orbited by eight planets, only two of which were habitable, namely [[J't'p'tan]] and [[Pehzehvar]].

{{Star-stub}}
